deviations.name: Alchemical Invulnerability
deviations.desc: 10% of enemies are equipped with an impervious Elemental Barrier that can only be destroyed by an Amphor of the corresponding element.

risks.name: Entanglement
risks.desc: Allies within 4m of slain enemies endure reduced Movement Speed and Parkour Velocity.

risks.name: Bold Venture
risks.desc: Enemies deal -15% Damage and take +15% Damage but gain +15% Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Fire Rate.

deviations.name: Barbed Glyphs
deviations.desc: Each Glyph inflicts a small amount of damage when collected.

risks.name: Devil's Bargain
risks.desc: Allies within 4m of slain enemies gain +25% Fire Rate at the cost of -50% Ammo Efficiency.

risks.name: Commanding Culverins
risks.desc: Rogue Culverins equip weapons that deal 5x Damage to Overguard and Necramechs.

deviations.name: Relentless Tide
deviations.desc: The Fragmented Tide never stops attacking.

risks.name: Vampyric Liminus
risks.desc: Slow moving, immortal, Duviri Liminus drain health and energy from allies who get too close.

deviations.name: Sealed Armor
deviations.desc: Enemies take 95% less damage from non-weak point hits.

risks.name: Devil's Bargain
risks.desc: Allies within 4m of slain enemies gain +25% Fire Rate at the cost of -50% Ammo Efficiency.

risks.name: Heavy Warfare
risks.desc: Enemies take x1.25 damage from Heavy Weapons and Thermian RPGs, 95% less from other sources. Enemies will drop heavy ammo packs and heavy weapon recall time reduced to 5s.

deviations.name: Miasmite Mash
deviations.desc: Enemies drop Miasmites upon death that immediately rush Flare.

risks.name: Scaldra Speed Run
risks.desc: All enemies are replaced with Scaldra and move much faster.

risks.name: Bolstered Belligerents
risks.desc: All enemies have Overguard equal to 50% of their max health.

deviations.name: Mitosis
deviations.desc: Two Legacytes spawn each round and twice as many captures are needed for success.

risks.name: Arcade Automata
risks.desc: Enemy guns launch large, slow moving orbs instead of their usual ordnance.

risks.name: Artillery Beacons
risks.desc: When killed, Scaldra troops drop artillery beacons that summon bombardments.

events.name: Make It Personal
events.desc: Kill 150 Scaldra Troops with Melee Weapons

jobs.challenge: Find a Zarium Accolade and take it to Melica
Awaken a dormant Void Angel and defeat it
Have all Armament types active at once
Find and open the Techrot cache before completing the mission
Kill 50 enemies while on high ground
